human_summary: Supply 0.004 WETH to Aave V3 (will receive aWETH)
warnings: Ensure WETH is approved for the Aave Pool (0x458F293454fE0d67EC0655f3672301301DD51422) before supplying.

COLLATERAL CHECK: WETH is an Isolation Mode asset. After supply, verify getUserAccountData shows totalCollateralBase > 0. If collateral was not auto-enabled, call mantle_buildAaveSetCollateral with user=<address> to diagnose and fix.

ISOLATION MODE: WETH is an Isolation Mode asset (debt ceiling $30,000,000). If this is your ONLY collateral you will enter Isolation Mode and can ONLY borrow: USDT0, USDC, USDe, GHO. Other assets (e.g. sUSDe, FBTC, wrsETH) CANNOT be borrowed in Isolation Mode.
